category_sources: source_facts.description says assembler framework; official README describes Keystone as a multi-platform, multi-architecture assembler framework.
display_name_sources: Official README heading is Keystone Engine; source_facts.name is keystone.
docs_sources: Official README points to docs/README.md for more documentation and the repository README for compilation and project overview.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/keystone-engine/keystone, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify assembler framework, kstool CLI, multiple CPU architectures, reverse-engineering-adjacent topics, and LLVM base.
